final:
module shift_register_8bit (
	input clk,
	input s_in,
	input [7:0] p_in,
	input load,
	output reg [7:0] q);
always @(posedge clk) begin
	if (load) begin
		q <= p_in;
	end else begin
		q <= {q[6:0], s_in};
	end
end
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      if (load) begin
        q <= ~p_in;
      end else begin
        q <= {~q[6:0], ~s_in};
      end;
    end
  end

endmodule
